reason: The image depicts Savonarola preaching to a crowd in Florence. The clothing, architecture, and atmosphere generally align with the period. There are no obvious anachronisms like smartphones or modern clothing. A very careful look at the crowd is needed to confirm that there are no hair styles (modern haircuts) or clothing styles that would be out of place (but I did not see any). The overall scene effectively captures the religious fervor of the time. However, the faces are a bit too smooth, almost like AI generated and thus my slight point deduction.
